notes: Enhanced the MCP Server Management Dialog with: (1) McpHealthIndicator component showing green/red/yellow/gray dots based on server status, (2) Add MCP Server button with name+URL form, (3) Remove server via DropdownMenu with disconnect mutation, (4) Keyboard support (Enter to submit, Escape to go back). Preserved all existing toggle/connect/disconnect/authenticate functionality. Typecheck shows 0 new errors (6 pre-existing). Tool count omitted as the mcp.status() API does not expose per-server tool counts.
